title: [PyCDE] Make module creation, generation generic
body:
This is a step on the way to untangling logic in module.py to be specific to `MSFTModuleOp`.
Classes can now supply callbacks for generation and creation, which allows for creating, generating modules that aren't necessarily  `MSFTModule(Extern)Op`s.

This commit will make a bit more sense through a later PR which adds support for FSM `MachineOp`s. This support is achieved solely through setting the new `create_cb,generator_cb` with no other changes required.
